elements.title: Gilbert Ray Hawes
elements.contents: ... that lawyer Gilbert Ray Hawes (pictured) exposed an American diplomat for bribing the president of Venezuela?

elements.title: Together at Christmas
elements.contents: ... that Catherine, Princess of Wales, gave her first public musical performance by playing the piano at the 2021 Together at Christmas service?

elements.title: the first Catholic bishop in Tasmania
elements.contents: ... that the remains of the first Catholic bishop in Tasmania were not returned to the island until 150 years after his death?

elements.title: a point-shaving scandal
elements.contents: ... that the men's basketball program at Tulane University was eliminated following a point-shaving scandal in 1985?

elements.title: Asjraq
elements.contents: ... that the male editors of the women's magazine Asjraq resigned in its fourth issue, announcing that their duties were complete?

elements.title: Zdenka Ziková
elements.contents: ... that opera singer Zdenka Ziková was once arrested by the Yugoslavian secret police?

elements.title: Verses of Love
elements.contents: ... that the Indonesian novel Verses of Love has been read as a challenge to Salman Rushdie's The Satanic Verses?

elements.title: Pieter van der Hoog
elements.contents: ... that Pieter van der Hoog was paid for delivering a baby with a piece of the black cloth covering the Kaaba?

elements.title: a book about fly biology
elements.contents: ... that a book about fly biology was listed for sale for more than US$23 million—plus shipping?
